info.title: ClearBank Financial Institutions API
info.description: ClearBank API endpoints for testing Automated ISA Transfer service in simulation environments.

post.summary: This endpoint is used to initiate an MIT Accept.

parameters.name: urn
parameters.description: The unique reference number for the transfer.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Your API Token, obtained from the ClearBank Portal.

parameters.name: DigitalSignature
parameters.description: Signed hash of the body of the request. The hash is signed by your private key.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the request; valid for 24 hours, max length 83.

requestBody.description: The information required to accept the transfer.

X-Correlation-Id.description: A unique identifier which should be referenced in any issue with any API call.
A unique identifier which should be referenced in any issue with any API call.

type.description: A URI reference RFC3986 that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence of the problem, except for purposes of localization (e.g., using proactive content negotiation; see RFC7231, Section 3.4)

status.description: The HTTP status code (RFC7231, Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

errors.description: Human-readable validation errors specific to this occurrence of the problem.

post.summary: This endpoint is used to initiate an MIT Transfer Out.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Your API Token, obtained from the ClearBank Portal.

parameters.name: DigitalSignature
parameters.description: Signed hash of the body of the request. The hash is signed by your private key.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the request; valid for 24 hours, max length 83.

requestBody.description: The information required to create the transfer out.

currentYearSubscriptionAmount.description: Current year subscription details for the other ISA. Must be between 0.00 and 20000.00

TisaMit.AcceptApiRequest.description: Information that is used to create a TISA MIT request for Accept

sun.description: The Service User Number (SUN) of the new ISA plan manager

newIsaAccountDetails.description: Account details of new ISA. Must be in format of SC######AC######## or RN######

currentYearSubscriptionAmount.description: The amount of the ISA subscription that has been used this year.

extendedCurrentYearType.description: Details regarding including or excluding current year subscriptions

amountFromCurrentYearSubscription.description: Optional amount to transfer from current year

dateOfBirth.description: The customer's date of birth. Must be in format YYYY-MM-DD

customerAccountDetails.description: The customer's account details on ClearBank platform. Must be in format of SCxxxxxxACxxxxxxxx

TisaMit.TransferOutApiRequest.description: Information that is used to create a TISA MIT request for a Transfer Out

pendDate.description: Optional pending date. Must be in format YYYY-MM-DD if provided

TisaMit.UpdateStateApiRequest.description: Information that is used to create a TISA MIT request for Update State

correlationId.description: CorrelationId generated by the MIT. Used to track requests through ClearBank systems

messageId.description: ID of the scheme message generated by the MIT

TisaMit.TisaMitResponse.description: Information representing the Automated ISA Transfer In MIT response
